concerns.text: FR-001: GEO download - The plan states 'GEO downloader.py' implements this, but the spec doesn't explicitly state *which* GEO series IDs are targeted. This needs to be clarified in the spec.
FR-002: Metabolomics download - Similar to FR-001, the plan references 'metabolomics_downloader.py' but the spec lacks specific Metabolomics Workbench experiment IDs. This needs clarification.
SC-001: Pearson r ≥ 0.5 - The plan references 'outputs/cv_metrics.csv' but the spec doesn't specify *which* metabolite this threshold applies to. It needs to be clarified.
SC-002: Permutation p ≤ 0.05 - Similar to SC-001, the spec doesn't specify *which* metabolite this p-value threshold applies to.
SC-004: SHA-256 ≥ 99% match - The plan references 'code/validation/checksum_validator.py' but the spec doesn't specify *which* files are being checksummed. This needs to be clarified.
SC-005: ≥95% sample pairing - The plan references 'code/validation/pairing_validator.py' but the spec doesn't specify *what* constitutes a 'sample' for pairing purposes. This needs clarification.
SC-006: ≥75% pathway genes retained - The plan references 'logs/feature_filtering.csv' but the spec doesn't specify *which* pathways are being considered when calculating retention.
